data.title: Ruins Seeker
data.synopsis: In a world full of dungeons with mystical monsters, there are brave people who take on the challenge of exploring them. One of these people is our protagonist. However, the unthinkable happens during her first exploration: she falls into a trap and is cursed with a curse that makes her attractive to monsters. Will she be able to get rid of the curse?

titles.title: Kui Cheng Shoufu Cong Youxi Kaishi
Hasan Fugo: The Richest Man in Game
破産富豪 The Richest Man in Game
Losing Money to Be a Tycoon

data.title: Kui Cheng Shoufu Cong Youxi Kaishi
title_synonyms: Hasan Fugo: The Richest Man in Game
破産富豪 The Richest Man in Game
Losing Money to Be a Tycoon
data.synopsis:
Pei Qian, an ordinary migrant worker, was accidentally bound to the wealth conversion system, which gave him a good opportunity to spend money in business and start his life over again. However, the system stipulates that you can only earn one yuan if you make a profit of 100 yuan, but all the money you lose can go into your own pocket. In order to lose money, Pei Qian chose the high-risk, money-burning game industry, and deliberately produced "alternative" games that went against the rules of the market. However, he unexpectedly became popular time and time again, earning a lot of money, and painfully became Pei Qian the "business wizard" admired by everyone, but only Pei Qian understands that he really just wants to lose money...

(Source: Bilibili, translated)

data.title: Bibliomania
data.synopsis:
Awakening in Room 431 of a labyrinthine, ever-expanding mansion, a young girl named Alice finds herself trapped in a surreal and nightmarish library. The rules of this bizarre estate are simple yet cruel: once the mansion expands to 666 rooms, a grand "party" will commence, sealing the fate of its guests for eternity. Determined to avoid this doom, Alice embarks on a perilous descent toward Room 000, the only supposed exit.

However, the mansion violently opposes her escape. A punishing physiological toll plagues her journey: the further Alice travels from her designated room, the more her physical body begins to rot, horrifyingly transforming her flesh and bone into letters and text.

As she navigates the maddening architecture, Alice encounters the twisted residents of the other rooms. From a self-righteous judge and a desperate aspiring musician to fictional entities completely unaware of their own artificiality, each being represents a different form of psychological entrapment and despair.

data.synopsis:
Ritsuka Fujimaru—humanity's last master. It would not have been possible to restore humanity without him. However, he does have a shortcoming... he is far too honest! A slapstick comedy in which Fujimaru's simple questions sway the heroic spirits!

(Source: MAL News)

titles.title: Wangzhe Rongyao: Rongyao Zhi Zhang - Sui Yue Pian
Honor of Kings: Chapter of Glory - EverDream Arc
王者荣耀：荣耀之章 碎月篇

data.title: Wangzhe Rongyao: Rongyao Zhi Zhang - Sui Yue Pian
data.title_japanese: 王者荣耀：荣耀之章 碎月篇
title_synonyms: Honor of Kings: Chapter of Glory - EverDream Arc
data.synopsis: The exciting 3D series revolves around the main character Li Bai and focuses on the main theme of "love and homecoming." The story invites the viewer to take an adventurous journey with Li Bai to the city of Chang'an on the mainland of Glory of Kings. The young man investigates, discovers the truth and solves the case of his hometown, the City of Broken Moon, demonstrating the pursuit of truth, goodness and beauty in a positive, courageous and forward-looking spirit. In pursuit of a higher purpose, young Li Bai leaves his family and embarks on a long journey. However, a letter from his family, which affects the wanderer's thoughts of returning to his hometown, brings about a shocking crisis that affects Chang'an.
